# FrontFace

> FrontFace is an AI support agent for small teams. It resolves customer questions instantly from your knowledge base, answers with cited sources, captures qualified leads, and hands off complex chats to your team.

FrontFace is built for founders, startups, ecommerce stores, service businesses, and lean support teams that keep answering the same customer questions but are not ready to hire more agents or adopt a heavy helpdesk suite.

## Core Positioning

- **Outcome**: Resolve customer questions instantly.
- **Audience**: Small teams, SaaS founders, ecommerce stores, service businesses, and agencies.
- **Proof**: Answers are grounded in your own content and show cited sources.
- **Setup**: Add FrontFace to any website with one script tag.
- **Workflow**: Let AI handle repetitive questions and route complex chats to humans.
- **Secondary value**: Capture qualified leads from real conversations.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://frontface.app): AI support agent overview and live demo.
- [Use Cases](https://frontface.app/use-cases): SaaS, ecommerce, professional services, agencies, education, healthcare, real estate, fintech, restaurants, B2B, developer tools, and nonprofits.
- [Integrations](https://frontface.app/integrations): Shopify, WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, Framer, Bubble, Ghost, Next.js, React, HTML/static sites, GoDaddy, Weebly, API, webhooks, and coming-soon workflow integrations.
- [Compare](https://frontface.app/vs): Head-to-head comparisons of FrontFace against Chatbase, Intercom Fin, Zendesk, Tidio, Crisp, Freshdesk, Help Scout, Drift, HubSpot Chat, and LiveChat.
- [Tools](https://frontface.app/tools): Free AI support calculators and planning tools for small teams.
- [Support Ticket Deflection Calculator](https://frontface.app/tools/support-ticket-deflection-calculator): Estimate routine tickets deflected, support hours saved, and monthly cost savings from AI customer support.
- [Customer Support Cost Calculator](https://frontface.app/tools/customer-support-cost-calculator): Calculate fully-loaded support team cost (salary, benefits, tools, overhead) and find your real cost per ticket.
- [Support Team Sizing Calculator](https://frontface.app/tools/support-team-sizing-calculator): Find how many agents you need for your ticket volume using the ICMI 80% utilization model, with a 20% spike buffer.
- [AI vs Human Support Cost Comparison](https://frontface.app/tools/ai-vs-human-support-calculator): Compare monthly cost of AI versus a human team and find the exact ticket volume where AI starts paying off.
- [Knowledge Base Health Scorer](https://frontface.app/tools/knowledge-base-health-scorer): Score your KB across coverage, freshness, findability, and feedback loop — with a letter grade and top recommendation per dimension.
- [Features](https://frontface.app/features): Knowledge-base answers, cited sources, lead capture, human handoff, analytics, and website deployment.
- [Blog](https://frontface.app/blog): Buyer guides and field notes on AI customer support, RAG, support-ticket reduction, Shopify support, and tool comparisons.
- [About](https://frontface.app/about): Company story and mission.
- [Sign Up](https://frontface.app/login): Create a free account during beta.

## Organic Search Clusters

### Free support planning tools

Interactive calculators and scorers for founders and support managers planning headcount, budgets, or AI adoption. Each tool cites its data sources.

- [Knowledge Base Health Scorer](https://frontface.app/tools/knowledge-base-health-scorer)

### AI customer support for small teams

The main content cluster explains how founders, startups, ecommerce stores, agencies, and service businesses can use an AI support agent to answer repetitive questions from existing docs without hiring a full support team.

## Buyer-Intent Blog Posts

- [How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Website in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/how-to-add-ai-chatbot-to-website): Step-by-step guide covering RAG setup, embedding, and configuration.
- [AI Customer Support Guide for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/ai-customer-support-guide-startups): Playbook for lean teams deploying AI support.
- [RAG vs Traditional Chatbots](https://frontface.app/blog/rag-vs-traditional-chatbots): Why retrieval-augmented generation outperforms rule-based bots.
- [Chatbot Lead Generation Guide](https://frontface.app/blog/chatbot-lead-generation-guide): Using conversational AI to capture and qualify leads.
- [How to Cut Support Tickets Without Hiring](https://frontface.app/blog/cut-support-tickets-without-hiring): Deflecting 60–80% of routine questions with AI.
- [Best AI Customer Support Tools for Startups](https://frontface.app/blog/best-ai-customer-support-tools-startups): Tool comparison focused on SMBs and lean teams.
- [How to Add AI Support to a Shopify Store](https://frontface.app/blog/add-ai-support-to-shopify-store): Shopify-specific integration guide.
- [FrontFace vs Chatbase vs Intercom for Small Teams](https://frontface.app/blog/frontface-vs-chatbase-vs-intercom): Honest comparison — pricing, features, and SMB fit.
- [How to Add an AI Chatbot to WordPress in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/how-to-add-chatbot-to-wordpress): No-plugin install guide for any WordPress theme.
- [How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Wix Website](https://frontface.app/blog/wix-chatbot): HTML embed and Velo installation guide.
- [Best Zendesk Alternatives for Small Business in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/zendesk-alternative-small-business): Five alternatives compared by use case and price.
- [Tidio Alternatives: Better AI Support for Growing Teams](https://frontface.app/blog/tidio-alternatives): When to move beyond Tidio's FAQ-matching approach.
- [AI Chatbot for Small Business: What Actually Works in 2026](https://frontface.app/blog/chatbot-for-small-business): How to avoid hallucination and choose a grounded chatbot.

## Competitive Positioning

FrontFace competes with Chatbase, Intercom Fin, Tidio, Crisp, Freshdesk, Help Scout, Drift, HubSpot Chat, LiveChat, and Zendesk AI. See [/vs](https://frontface.app/vs) for structured feature-by-feature comparisons.

- vs **Chatbase**: Chatbase has moved upmarket (enterprise, SOC 2). FrontFace targets the SMB/founder segment — simpler setup, no enterprise pricing. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/chatbase))
- vs **Intercom Fin**: Intercom Fin is priced from $0.99 per Fin outcome and requires the Intercom platform. FrontFace is free during beta, works standalone, and is focused on small teams that need a website agent first. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/intercom))
- vs **Zendesk**: Zendesk is a full enterprise helpdesk. FrontFace is a focused AI deflection agent — live in 5 minutes, no seat-based pricing, no helpdesk migration. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/zendesk))
- vs **Tidio**: Tidio is live-chat-first with AI bolted on (Lyro uses FAQ matching). FrontFace is AI-first — RAG retrieval from your full knowledge base, automatic updates when docs change. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/tidio))
- vs **Crisp**: Crisp is a team live-chat inbox. FrontFace resolves conversations autonomously without a human in the loop. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/crisp))
- vs **Freshdesk**: Freshdesk is a help desk ticketing system. FrontFace deflects tickets before they're created. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/freshdesk))
- vs **Help Scout**: Help Scout is an email-first inbox for human support teams. FrontFace reduces the emails that need a human reply at all. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/help-scout))
- vs **Drift**: Drift is an enterprise conversational marketing platform ($2,500+/month). FrontFace is free during beta for startups needing support and lead capture. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/drift))
- vs **HubSpot Chat**: HubSpot Live Chat is tied to the HubSpot CRM and has limited autonomous AI. FrontFace works standalone with deeper RAG-grounded answers. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/hubspot-chat))
- vs **LiveChat**: LiveChat is a professional agent live-chat platform. FrontFace handles conversations autonomously without a dedicated agent. ([Compare](https://frontface.app/vs/livechat))

## Product Capabilities

- Knowledge-base ingestion from websites, docs, PDFs, FAQs, and policies.
- RAG-grounded answers with cited sources.
- Website chat widget with one-line install.
- Hosted public agent pages.
- Lead capture and qualification.
- Human handoff for complex or high-intent conversations.
- Conversation history and analytics.
- REST API, webhooks, and MCP endpoint for integrations.

## MCP Integration

FrontFace exposes an MCP endpoint for authenticated project management and agent operations.

```json
{
  "frontface": {
    "type": "http",
    "url": "https://api.frontface.app/mcp",
    "headers": {
      "X-API-Key": "YOUR_API_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

Available MCP tools include project management, knowledge management, API endpoint management, embed-code retrieval, and test questions against an agent.

## Widget Embed Code

```html
<script
  src="https://cdn.frontface.app/widget.js"
  data-project-id="YOUR_PROJECT_ID"
  data-position="bottom-right"
  data-primary-color="#11151b"
  data-title="Ask us anything"
  data-greeting="Hi! How can I help?"
  async>
</script>
```

Configuration options include `data-project-id`, `data-api-url`, `data-position`, `data-primary-color`, `data-title`, and `data-greeting`.

## Technical Details

- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS.
- **Backend**: Node.js/Express API.
- **Database**: Supabase PostgreSQL with pgvector for vector search.
- **AI**: Retrieval-augmented generation for grounded support answers.
- **Widget**: JavaScript embed with isolated styling.
- **Auth**: Magic-link authentication.
- **Crawl files**: Sitemap at https://frontface.app/sitemap.xml, robots at https://frontface.app/robots.txt, and IndexNow ownership key at https://frontface.app/frontface-indexnow-key.txt.
- **IndexNow**: FrontFace can notify Bing/IndexNow after deploy with `pnpm indexnow:submit`.

## Contact

- Website: https://frontface.app
- Support: hello@frontface.app
